author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

New Star Atlas Lore Wiki!

Have you ever thought to yourself, "I really wish there was a single place where I could read all the canonical Star Atlas lore."?

Introducing the new Star Atlas Lore Wiki, your ultimate destination for exploring the rich lore of the Galia Expanse!

The Star Atlas Lore Wiki offers insights into:
• Factions
• History of the Galia Expanse
• Characters
• Planets, moons, resources, and sectors of space
• Ship manufacturers
• Species and races
• Governments and groups
• Religion and culture

Be sure to check back monthly, as this cornerstone of information will be evolving regularly!

 | https://lore.staratlas.com/
